default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, ne AI
default.description: Horizon Tech eteekateeka era ewa software za bizinensi, ebirowoozo bya AI, ebikozesebwa mu kire, n'ebikozesebwa bya digito eri ebibiina eby'amaanyi.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Enterprise software, AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, and IoT delivery for global teams.

about.title: About Horizon Tech | Company Mission and Team
about.description: Yiga ebikwata ku Horizon Tech, ekigendererwa kyaffe, n'engeri gye tukolamu tekinologiya ow'oku ntikko.

team.title: Ttiimu | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Meet the engineers and leaders building enterprise software and cloud platforms at Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Emirimu | Build With Horizon Tech
careers.description: Zuula emirimu egy'enjawulo n'okukulaakulanya emirimu gyo ng'okozesa ekitongole kya tekinologiya ekya Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Contact Horizon Tech | Tandika pulojekiti yo
contact.description: Yogerako ne Paxful okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku pulojekiti yo, ebyetaago bya tekinologiya, n'obudde bw'okuweereza.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Horizon Tech Results
caseStudies.description: Soma ebitabo by'abasuubuzi n'ebyavudde mu kunoonyereza kwa Horizon Tech mu bizinensi zonna.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Technical insights, delivery lessons, and architecture guidance from Horizon Tech.

education.title: Ebyenjigiriza | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Guides, references, and technical learning resources from Horizon Tech.

support.title: Support | Horizon Tech
support.description: Get support resources and contact options for Horizon Tech services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Soma enkola ya Paxful ey'okukuuma obubaka n'obukulembeze bw'eggwanga.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Soma obukwakkulizo bwa Paxful ku webusayiti yaffe n'empeereza zaffe.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Manage your Horizon Tech profile, settings, and account details.

firstTimeSetup.title: First-Time Setup | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Complete first-time account setup to continue in Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Zzaawo akaawunti yo eya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Fuba okulaba ng'okozesa akaawunti yo ey'oku mutimbagano

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Kakasa endagiriro yo eya email okukozesa akaawunti yo ya Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.description: You don't currently have access to this Horizon Tech page.

services.title: Services | Horizon Tech
services.description: Explore Horizon Tech services in software engineering, AI, cloud, DevOps, and digital transformation.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: See Horizon Tech experiments and prototypes in AI and applied engineering.
